sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14772" key="a)rgefa/nths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀργεφάντης</orth>, coined as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀργειφόντης,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
